# API Reference

**Approach:** This reference was generated by `apps/api/src/scripts/generate-api-docs.ts`
using static regex extraction over Hono route files, supplemented by a hand-maintained
metadata table for roles, request/response shapes, and notes. Hono sub-routers are not
introspectable at runtime without full app instantiation, so this hybrid approach was chosen.

**Authentication:** All `/api/v1/*` routes require a valid session cookie or Bearer token
(via better-auth). Role enforcement is noted per route.

**Rate limits:**
- Auth paths (`/api/auth/*`): 10 req/min/IP
- Mutating paths (`POST/PATCH/PUT/DELETE /api/v1/*`): 60 req/min/user

**Error format:** `{ code: string, message: string }` with appropriate HTTP status.

---

## Auth (better-auth)

| Method | Path | Required Role | Request | Response | Notes |
|--------|------|---------------|---------|----------|-------|
| `POST` | `/api/auth/sign-in/email` | public | `{ email, password }` | `{ token, user }` | Rate-limited 10 req/min/IP. Triggers lockout after 10 failures. |
| `POST` | `/api/auth/sign-out` | authenticated | — | `{ ok: true }` | — |
| `POST` | `/api/auth/sign-up/email` | public (invite-only flow) | `{ email, password, name, inviteToken }` | `{ user }` | — |

## Health

| Method | Path | Required Role | Request | Response | Notes |
|--------|------|---------------|---------|----------|-------|
| `GET` | `/healthz` | public | — | `{ status: "ok" }` | — |

## Other

| Method | Path | Required Role | Request | Response | Notes |
|--------|------|---------------|---------|----------|-------|
| `GET` | `/api/v1/healthz/deep` | x-health-token header required | — | `{ db: "ok"|"error", r2: "ok"|"unconfigured", timestamp }` | — |

## Session

| Method | Path | Required Role | Request | Response | Notes |
|--------|------|---------------|---------|----------|-------|
| `GET` | `/api/v1/me` | any authenticated | — | `{ actor: { userId, staffId, roles } }` | — |

## KRA

| Method | Path | Required Role | Request | Response | Notes |
|--------|------|---------------|---------|----------|-------|
| `GET` | `/api/v1/kra/:cycleId` | any authenticated (staffReadScope) | — | `{ kras: KRA[] }` | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/kra/approve` | appraiser (scoped to own direct reports) | `kraApprove` — `{ cycleId }` | `{ ok: true }` or `{ code, message }` 409 | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/kra/draft` | staff (own cycle) | `kraCreateBatch` — `{ cycleId, kras: [{ perspective, description, weightPct, measurement, target, order, rubric1to5 }] }` | `{ ok: true }` or `{ code, message }` 409 | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/kra/reject` | appraiser (scoped to own direct reports) | `kraReject` — `{ cycleId, note }` | `{ ok: true }` or `{ code, message }` 409 | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/kra/submit/:cycleId` | staff (own cycle) | — | `{ ok: true }` or `{ code, message }` 409 | — |

## Cycle

| Method | Path | Required Role | Request | Response | Notes |
|--------|------|---------------|---------|----------|-------|
| `GET` | `/api/v1/cycle/current` | any authenticated (own cycle) | — | `{ cycle: PerformanceCycle | null }` | — |
| `GET` | `/api/v1/cycle/departments` | hra only | — | `{ items: [{ id, name, code }] }` | — |
| `GET` | `/api/v1/cycle/for-staff/:staffId` | any authenticated (staffReadScope) | — | `{ cycle: PerformanceCycle | null }` or 403/404 | — |
| `GET` | `/api/v1/cycle/list` | hra (all org cycles) | staff (own cycle only) | query: `{ state?, fy?, staffId?, departmentId?, limit?, offset? }` | `{ items: CycleSummary[], total: number }` | — |
| `GET` | `/api/v1/cycle/org-staff` | hra only | — | `{ items: [{ id, name, employeeNo, departmentId }] }` | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/cycle/open-mid-year-bulk` | hra only | `{ scope: "org" | "department" | "staffIds", departmentId?, staffIds? }` | `{ opened: number, failed: [{ cycleId, error }] }` | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/cycle/open-mid-year-for-staff` | hra only | `{ cycleId }` | `{ ok: true }` or `{ ok: false, error }` 409 | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/cycle/open-pms-bulk` | hra only | `{ scope: "org" | "department" | "staffIds", departmentId?, staffIds? }` | `{ opened: number, failed: [{ cycleId, error }] }` | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/cycle/open-pms-for-staff` | hra only | `{ cycleId }` | `{ ok: true }` or `{ ok: false, error }` 409 | — |

## Staff

| Method | Path | Required Role | Request | Response | Notes |
|--------|------|---------------|---------|----------|-------|
| `GET` | `/api/v1/staff/import/batches` | hra | it_admin | query: `orgId` | `{ batches: StaffImportBatch[] }` | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/staff/import` | hra | it_admin | raw CSV body; query param `orgId` | `{ inserted, updated, errors }` | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/staff/import/apply` | hra | it_admin | `{ batchId }` | `{ ok: true, applied }` or 422 | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/staff/import/revert` | hra | it_admin | `{ batchId }` | `{ ok: true }` or 422 | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/staff/import/stage` | hra | it_admin | `{ csv: string, orgId: string }` | `{ batchId, rowCount, validationErrors }` | — |

| `POST` | `/api/v1/mid-year/submit` | staff (own cycle) | `midYearSubmit` — `{ cycleId }` | `{ ok: true }` or 409 | — |

## PMS

| Method | Path | Required Role | Request | Response | Notes |
|--------|------|---------------|---------|----------|-------|
| `GET` | `/api/v1/pms/:cycleId/pdf` | any authenticated (staffReadScope) | — | `{ url: string, expiresAt: string }` (presigned R2 URL, 24h TTL) | — |
| `GET` | `/api/v1/pms/:cycleId/score` | any authenticated (staffReadScope) | — | `{ breakdown: ScoreBreakdown }` | — |
| `GET` | `/api/v1/pms/:cycleId/state` | any authenticated (staffReadScope) | — | `{ cycle, pms, kraRatings, behavioural, contributions, career, growth, comments }` | — |
| `GET` | `/api/v1/pms/:cycleId/verify-signatures` | any authenticated (staffReadScope) | — | `{ ok: boolean, firstFailureAt?, reason? }` | — |
| `GET` | `/api/v1/pms/behavioural-dimensions` | any authenticated | — | `{ items: [{ code, title, description, order, anchors }] }` | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/pms/behavioural` | appraiser | staff (own) | `saveBehaviouralRatings` — `{ pmsId, ratings: [{ dimensionCode, rating1to5, rubricAnchorText, comment? }] }` | `{ ok: true }` or 409 | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/pms/career` | appraiser | staff (own) | `saveCareerDevelopment` — `{ pmsId, potentialWindow, readyIn?, comments? }` | `{ ok: true }` or 409 | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/pms/comment` | appraiser | appraisee | next_level | `savePmsComment` — `{ pmsId, role, body }` | `{ ok: true }` or 409 | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/pms/contributions` | staff (own) | `saveStaffContributions` — `{ pmsId, items: [{ whenDate, achievement, weightPct }] }` | `{ ok: true }` or 409 | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/pms/finalize` | hra only | `finalizePms` — `{ cycleId }` | `{ ok: true }` or 409 | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/pms/growth` | appraiser | staff (own) | `savePersonalGrowth` — `{ pmsId, trainingNeeds?, comments? }` | `{ ok: true }` or 409 | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/pms/kra-ratings` | appraiser | staff (own cycle, during self-review) | `savePmsKraRatings` — `{ pmsId, ratings: [{ kraId, resultAchieved, finalRating, comment? }] }` | `{ ok: true }` or 409 | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/pms/open-window` | hra only | `openPmsWindow` — `{ cycleId }` | `{ ok: true }` or 409 | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/pms/reopen` | hra only | `{ cycleId, reason: string (min 3) }` | `{ ok: true }` or 409 | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/pms/return-to-appraisee` | appraiser (scoped) | `pmsCycleAction` — `{ cycleId }` | `{ ok: true }` or 409 | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/pms/return-to-appraiser` | next_level (scoped) | `pmsCycleAction` — `{ cycleId }` | `{ ok: true }` or 409 | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/pms/sign` | appraiser | appraisee | next_level (own comment) | `signPmsComment` — `{ commentId }` | `{ ok: true }` or 409 | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/pms/submit-appraiser` | appraiser (scoped) | `pmsCycleAction` — `{ cycleId }` | `{ ok: true }` or 409 | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/pms/submit-next-level` | appraiser (scoped) | `pmsCycleAction` — `{ cycleId }` | `{ ok: true }` or 409 | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/pms/submit-self-review` | staff (own cycle) | `pmsCycleAction` — `{ cycleId }` | `{ ok: true }` or 409 | — |

| `POST` | `/api/v1/ai/kra-quality` | staff | appraiser (scoped) | `{ cycleId }` | `{ feedback: KraQualityFeedback[] }` or 409/429/502 | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/ai/mid-year-nudges` | any authenticated (staffReadScope) | `{ cycleId }` | `{ nudges: string[] }` or 409/429/502 | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/ai/staff-summary` | any authenticated (staffReadScope) | `{ cycleId }` | `{ summary: string }` or 409/429/502 | Subject to AI budget (tokens/day). Rate-limited per user. |

|--------|------|---------------|---------|----------|-------|
| `GET` | `/api/v1/exports/jobs` | hra only | — | `{ jobs: ExportJob[] }` | — |
| `GET` | `/api/v1/exports/jobs/:jobId` | hra only (own org) | — | `{ job: ExportJob }` — status: queued | processing | completed | failed | — |
| `GET` | `/api/v1/exports/jobs/:jobId/download` | hra only (own org) | — | `{ url: string, expiresAt: string }` (presigned R2, 24h TTL) | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/exports/pms-org` | hra only | `{ fy? }` | `{ jobId }` — async; poll GET /api/v1/exports/jobs/:jobId | — |

| Method | Path | Required Role | Request | Response | Notes |
|--------|------|---------------|---------|----------|-------|
| `GET` | `/api/v1/admin/audit/verify` | hra | it_admin | query: `{ from: YYYY-MM-DD, to: YYYY-MM-DD }` | `{ ok: true }` or `{ ok: false, firstFailureAt, reason }` | — |

## Auth (session)

| Method | Path | Required Role | Request | Response | Notes |
|--------|------|---------------|---------|----------|-------|
| `POST` | `/api/v1/auth/logout-all` | any authenticated (self) | — | `{ ok: true }` | Destroys all active sessions for the caller. |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/auth/mfa-recover` | public (rate-limited) | `{ email, recoveryCode }` | `{ ok: true }` or `{ ok: false, error }` 401 | Consumes a single-use TOTP recovery code. Deletes the TOTP secret for re-enrollment. |

## Admin — Auth

| Method | Path | Required Role | Request | Response | Notes |
|--------|------|---------------|---------|----------|-------|
| `GET` | `/api/v1/admin/auth/sessions` | it_admin | query: `{ userId }` | `{ sessions: Session[] }` | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/admin/auth/logout-user` | it_admin | `{ userId, reason }` | `{ ok: true }` | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/admin/auth/unlock` | hra | it_admin | `{ userId, reason }` | `{ ok: true }` | — |

## Admin — Impersonation

| Method | Path | Required Role | Request | Response | Notes |
|--------|------|---------------|---------|----------|-------|
| `GET` | `/api/v1/admin/impersonation/active` | it_admin | — | `{ session: ImpersonationSession | null }` | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/admin/impersonation/start` | it_admin | `{ targetUserId, reason, durationMin? (1–60) }` | `{ ok: true, sessionId, expiresAt }` or `{ ok: false, error }` 403/400 | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/admin/impersonation/stop` | it_admin | `{ sessionId?, reason? }` | `{ ok: true }` | — |

## Onboarding

| Method | Path | Required Role | Request | Response | Notes |
|--------|------|---------------|---------|----------|-------|
| `GET` | `/api/v1/onboarding/invite/verify` | public | query: `{ token }` | `{ ok: true, email, roles }` or `{ ok: false, error }` | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/onboarding/invite` | hra | it_admin | `{ email, staffId?, roles, orgId }` | `{ ok: true, inviteToken, link }` | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/onboarding/invite/accept` | public | `{ token, password }` | `{ ok: true }` or `{ ok: false, error }` | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/onboarding/password-reset/accept` | public | `{ token, password }` | `{ ok: true }` or `{ ok: false, error }` | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/onboarding/password-reset/initiate` | public (rate-limited) | `{ email }` | `{ ok: true }` (always, to avoid email enumeration) | — |

## Admin — Access Review

| Method | Path | Required Role | Request | Response | Notes |
|--------|------|---------------|---------|----------|-------|
| `GET` | `/api/v1/admin/access-review/cycles` | hra | it_admin | — | `{ cycles: AccessReviewCycle[] }` | — |
| `GET` | `/api/v1/admin/access-review/cycles/:id/items` | hra | it_admin | query: `{ decision?: pending|retain|revoke|escalate, limit? }` | `{ items: AccessReviewItem[] }` | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/admin/access-review/cycles/:id/items/:itemId/decide` | hra | it_admin | `{ decision: "retain"|"revoke"|"escalate", reason }` | `{ ok: true }` | — |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/admin/access-review/cycles/generate` | hra | it_admin | `{ periodStart, periodEnd }` | `{ cycleId }` | — |

## Zod Schema Locations

Core request schemas are defined in `packages/shared/src/`. Key exports:

| Schema name | Used in |
|-------------|---------|
| `kraCreateBatch` | POST /api/v1/kra/draft |
| `kraApprove` | POST /api/v1/kra/approve |
| `kraReject` | POST /api/v1/kra/reject |
| `midYearSave` | POST /api/v1/mid-year/save |
| `midYearSubmit` | POST /api/v1/mid-year/submit |
| `midYearAck` | POST /api/v1/mid-year/ack |
| `openMidYearWindow` | POST /api/v1/mid-year/open |
| `savePmsKraRatings` | POST /api/v1/pms/kra-ratings |
| `saveBehaviouralRatings` | POST /api/v1/pms/behavioural |
| `saveStaffContributions` | POST /api/v1/pms/contributions |
| `saveCareerDevelopment` | POST /api/v1/pms/career |
| `savePersonalGrowth` | POST /api/v1/pms/growth |
| `savePmsComment` | POST /api/v1/pms/comment |
| `pmsCycleAction` | POST /api/v1/pms/submit-self-review and related |
| `finalizePms` | POST /api/v1/pms/finalize |
| `signPmsComment` | POST /api/v1/pms/sign |
| `openPmsWindow` | POST /api/v1/pms/open-window |

Inline Zod schemas (defined in route files, not shared) are described in the table above.
